{"society_power": 3.5, "state_power": 2.5, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "Dissolution of Gran Colombia; decentralized New Granada under Santander", "reasoning": "The collapse of Bol\u00edvar's centralizing project and secession of Venezuela and Ecuador destroyed the ambitious central state, leaving a weaker, fiscally shackled successor still dependent on caudillos and colonial-era taxes. Meanwhile the quasi-federal 1832 constitution, emerging Liberal\u2013Conservative factional mobilization, and entrenched regional/Church/elite counterweights modestly increased organized (though narrow and oligarchic) society."}
